reviews.review_description:
Me and my friend found this game and we play it all the time we are kind of OG and I make content on YouTube fully dedicated to this game (I’m called Gabron 19 on YouTube) and would love to become or mod or help suggest things. 
So if u see this game download instantly.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind review!
Glad to hear that you enjoy it!

reviews.review_description: I’m suprised this game ISNT paid with the amount of effort put into it. Yes, I am a little biased with me being a mod but this game is incredible. Water physics, particles, and effects. Actively updating game. Healthy community and very nice staff. Awesome gamemodes and so much more. GET YHE GAMEEE!!!

reviews.review_title: My opinion as a og player
reviews.review_description: I've been playing this game since its release and I can say that it's only been evolving, each update really adds to the game and the monkey race is really fun in general I recommend this fangame

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! I am very glad to hear that you enjoy the game. Thanks for playing since the beginning! :D

reviews.review_description: This game is just honestly good

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! I am very glad to see you enjoy it :)

reviews.review_description: Saying the game is good is an understatement, there is nothing that can describe this game, it is literally better than any game I have ever played, the owner is super nice. Moderators are just the best. The update that's coming soon, I can not wait for you got should definitely get this game.
